title: Symbolic verification and figure-generation code for: A Unified Eigenfunction Approach to Massive and Massless Particle Kinematics in Special Relativity
description: Reproducible research code accompanying the Physical Review D theory paper "A Unified Eigenfunction Approach to Massive and Massless Particle Kinematics in Special Relativity." The repository contains SymPy symbolic verifications of the Section II / Appendix A identities (eigenvalue equation, Wronskian, null light-cone basis, Einstein velocity addition, SO(1,1) boost group law), of the Section III velocity functional f(eta,a)=a*tanh(eta)/sqrt(1+a^2 tanh^2 eta) and its closed-form proper-time / affine primitives and massless (a -> infinity) limits, a high-precision mpmath recomputation of Table I, and matplotlib scripts that regenerate the paper's figures. A single driver (run_all.py) reproduces all results and figures and exits nonzero on any failure.
